overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character exploring a candlelit Divination classroom with crystal balls, tapestries, and Gothic architecture. The character walks along the perimeter, examines bookshelves, and discovers a hidden trapdoor beneath a large tapestry.

scene_state.functional_zone: Divination classroom with crystal ball tables

events.description: character stops walking to examine the framed wall tapestry and standing globe

agents.ego_description: walking along the right wall of the classroom, observing the crystal balls and tapestries

entered.detail: round wooden tables with glowing crystal balls and candles
heavy red drapes framing the gothic windows
tall diamond-paned windows showing dark night sky outside
ornate candle holders providing warm illumination
large framed textile hanging on the stone wall
antique terrestrial globe on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the warm, candlelit Divination classroom, passing tables with glowing crystal balls. Heavy red curtains frame the tall gothic windows as the character approaches the right wall to examine a framed tapestry and antique globe.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corner with bookshelves and reading nook

events.description: character approaches a glowing Demiguise Moon collectible on the side table

agents.ego_description: walking to the back corner to examine the tall bookshelves and collectible item

entered.detail: decorative fabric banners hanging from the ceiling
floor-to-ceiling bookshelf filled with leather-bound tomes
upholstered reading chair beside a small table
antique weighing scales on the side table
tall lamp with glowing green glass shade
glowing blue crescent moon object for collection

segments.scene_description: Moving to the back corner, the character passes a spiral staircase and approaches a tall bookshelf filled with books. A leather armchair sits nearby with a glowing Demiguise Moon collectible on the table, while hanging tapestries decorate the upper walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: center area with large floor tapestry

events.description: large tapestry on the floor magically lifts to reveal a hidden wooden trapdoor

agents.ego_description: returning to the center area and approaching the large tapestry to reveal the trapdoor

entered.detail: round tables with crystal balls seen from the opposite angle
massive vertical tapestry depicting a figure in red robes
hidden door in the floor revealed beneath the tapestry

segments.scene_description: The character walks back toward the center of the room, passing the crystal ball tables once more. Approaching a large hanging tapestry on the left wall, the fabric magically lifts to reveal a hidden wooden trapdoor in the floor, suggesting a secret passage below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warm, candlelit Divination classroom that shifts from a general exploration of mystical artifacts to the discovery of a hidden secret. It begins by gliding past tables of glowing crystal balls and heavy red curtains before turning toward the right wall to examine a framed tapestry and an antique globe. As the camera moves into the back corner, the scene expands to reveal a spiral staircase and a tall bookshelf, passing a leather armchair and a glowing Demiguise Moon collectible. The perspective then shifts back toward the center of the room, passing the crystal ball tables once more before approaching a large hanging tapestry on the left wall. Finally, the fabric magically lifts to reveal a hidden wooden trapdoor in the floor, uncovering a secret passage.
